items.title: Eli Lilly outlays $2.3bn to acquire blood cancer specialist Ajax Therapeutics
items.summary: Ajax’s lead asset is AJ1-11095, a once-daily Type II JAK2 inhibitor taken orally, which is currently in a Phase I trial.

items.title: Pharma Meets AI Conference 2026: AI in pharma begins delivering measurable ROI
items.summary: AI tools that slash time spent on administration prove their worth and free up pharma workers for higher value tasks.

items.title: Pharma Meets AI Conference 2026: AI governance shifts to embedded practice
items.summary: AI capabilities within pharma are evolving from add-on to an arm of core business demanding overhauled AI governance.

items.title: ESCMID Global 2026: Pritelivir excels in immunocompromised refractory HSV patients
items.summary: Aicuris’s pritelivir is forecast to be a significant advancement for immunocompromised patients with refractory HSV infections.

items.title: MFN changing the rules of the game for the Nordic countries
items.summary: Pharmaceutical trade associations across the Nordic region have reacted with vigilance to a recent GlobalData report that highlighted the potential effect on product launch and withdrawal trends in Europe caused by the US' MFN policy.
